name: 23" x 36" Metal Curved Top Mirror Gold - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Add instant glamour and interest to your space with this Metal Curved Top Mirror from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This wall-mount mirror has a sleek novelty silhouette with a curved top for added intrigue, and it's encased in a aluminum metal frame for a touch of glam shine. Plus, it comes ready for mounting with included hardware. Try adding this sleek modern novelty mirror above a console table in your home's entryway, or surround it with framed photos and art as part of a living room gallery wall.
